# Generated Data

This folder contains generated training and testing datasets for physics-informed neural network (PINN) models, specifically for the Black-Scholes and Heston frameworks.

## File Formats

* **`.parquet`**: The primary full datasets generated by the data generation notebooks. We use compression via the Parquet format to ensure fast read/write speeds for large point domains.
* **`*_sample.csv`**: Small subsets (approx. 100 rows) generated via `code/scripts/sample.py` for quick manual inspection of data distributions and columns using standard spreadsheet software.

## Data Structure

Depending on the model, datasets typically include:
* `S`: Asset Price
* `v`: Variance (Heston only)
* `tau`: Time to Maturity ($T - t$)
* `V_data`: Target Option Price (Used for inverse calibration tasks)
* `point_type`: Categorical label identifying whether the point belongs to the interior (PDE residual), initial condition (IC), regular boundary condition (BC), or market data (`market_data`).
